nasb.text: Solomon answered all her questions; nothing was hidden from Solomon which he did not explain to her.

esv.text: And Solomon answered all her questions. There was nothing hidden from Solomon that he could not explain to her.

cnv.text: 所羅門把她的一切難題，都給她解答了；沒有一樣難倒所羅門，不能給她解答的。

ccb.text: 所罗门王解答了她所有的问题，没有一样难得住他。
